question: Choose the correct word: The new flat is ________ bigger than the old one — you can really feel the difference.
Fill in the blank: 'Home ________' refers to the things that make a home comfortable, like furniture, appliances and familiar surroundings.
Choose the correct option: The tiny house movement offers a way of living more ________ and less wastefully.
Fill in the blank: He decided to ________ roots in Amman after living abroad for ten years.

Read the passage and answer the question.

'Living in a compact home might work for one, or even two people, but what about when you are obliged to compete for space with several others? This is a question being investigated by a NASA-funded Mars simulation experiment. Six crew members share a space which is 11 metres in diameter, i.e. the size of a medium-sized, one-bedroom apartment. They each have their own personal space, big enough for a tiny bed and chair.'

How large is the shared space in the NASA experiment?
Choose the correct word: We use ________ phrasal verbs like 'switch on/off' when the object can be placed between the verb and the particle.
Fill in the blank: The old armchairs were badly ________ — the fabric was torn and the legs were broken.
Choose the correct modal: You ________ to switch on the light — it's automatic. (no necessity)
Fill in the blank: ________ first time I went to Aqaba was in 2015.
Choose the correct phrasal verb: I'll ________ the wall with a damp cloth to remove the coffee stain.
Fill in the blank: 'It is not ________ for divers to do this job. A robot can do it safely instead.'
Choose the correct word: The room was very ________, making it difficult to move around. There was furniture everywhere.
Fill in the blank: The sentence 'He succeeded ________ persuading her to help' is grammatically correct.
Choose the correct article: I prefer ________ mountains to the sea. (general preference — plural noun)
Fill in the blank: The report stated that a ________ number of students requested storage lockers in the common room.
Choose the correct word: 'There are ________ candidates for this job — far more than we can possibly interview.'
Fill in the blank: The phrase 'And that's it!' is used to ________ a set of instructions.
Choose the correct option: 'Huda could speak four languages.' This expresses ________ ability.
Fill in the blank: The linker ________ is used in reports to announce a change of topic.
Choose the correct article: ________ 18th century was a period of great change in Europe.
Fill in the blank: I would ________ you not to touch that wire — it could be dangerous.
Choose the correct option: 'The freezer broke down and was leaking.' What does 'broke down' mean?
Fill in the blank: In the writing task, linkers like 'with ________ to' are used to announce a new topic in a report.
Choose the correct modal: 'There's a storm coming. It ________ rain heavily tonight.' (general possibility)
Fill in the blank: The cup smashed and the pieces went everywhere. My brother ________ them up with a dustpan.
Choose the correct option: 'We are obliged to come to school on time.' The obligation here comes from ________.
Fill in the blank: In Japanese apartments, bedding is folded every day so that the room can be used for ________ other than sleeping.
Choose the correct article: She lives in ________ small flat near the university. (first mention — indefinite)
Fill in the blank: 'Try to ________ (+ing) breathing recycled air for too long — it's not healthy.'
Choose the correct option: 'Luckily, I could / was able to / managed to make new friends quickly at university.' Which option is INCORRECT?
Fill in the blank: The cloth had a stain on it, so I ________ it in warm soapy water for an hour.
Choose the correct article: Fadi always loved ________ school. (institution — love for learning)
Fill in the blank: In report writing, we use 'Some students expressed a ________ for bright colours on the walls.'
Choose the correct option: 'She has succeeded in ________ the problem.' Complete the sentence correctly.
Fill in the blank: According to the reading, living small forces you to go out and ________ with the rest of the world.
Choose the correct word: The bathroom sink is broken. You need to ________ the damaged part before it gets worse.
Fill in the blank: All you have ________ is press the red button to start the machine.
Choose the correct option: Report writing should begin with an introduction explaining ________ the information was obtained.
Fill in the blank: The sentence 'My parents were able to / managed to find a nice apartment' shows ________ ability.
Choose the correct article: People who live in ________ prison often face many challenges when they are released.
